'''Urdruua''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gangster on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] generally being seen accompanied by a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] assistant. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] he tried to kill [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to get back at her for a past misdeed she had done to his family. He used several methods including poison gas, mercenaries, and [[Smart mine/Legends|smart mines]]. After Aurra Sing escaped each obstacle, she detonated a comm-pack which she brought to him earlier. This killed Urdruua, along with his [[Unidentified Gran (Nar Shaddaa)|assistant]] and anyone inside his palace.
